theme: water bombers containing a spreading wildfire
title: Airtanker Isochrone Cut
strategies: do-nothing baseline: no drops at all, fire burns everything reachable by the horizon
reactive frontier-chasing: sort cells by their unprotected ignition time and race each plane to whichever unprotected cell ignites soonest, refuelling on demand

isochrone-cut search: compute the deterministic fire-arrival-time map, then for each candidate cut time T check whether the fleet (accounting for travel time and single-slot-per-lake refill queueing) can fireproof the entire boundary ring of the T-ball before it ignites; keep the schedulable cut with the smallest burned interior, then mop up with any leftover capacity
